<a id="class-egenre"></a>

# EGenre

**Inherits:** `Object`

ID3 genre enum used by song metadata resources Values mirror common ID3 genre ordering for consistent serialisation Thanks [https://exiftool.org/TagNames/ID3.html](https://exiftool.org/TagNames/ID3.html)  :)
